name: Lynda Baxter Mosely Tennis Complex
description: Lynda Baxter Mosely Tennis Complex is a place to play pickleball in Moultrie, GA. There are 9 asphalt courts. 4 are indoors and 5 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Moultrie Pickleball Club
description: Moultrie Pickleball Club is a place to play pickleball in Moultrie, GA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts can be reserved.

name: Moultrie YMCA
description: Moultrie YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Moultrie, GA. There are 9 hard and wood courts. 6 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Tommy Meredith Gym
description: Come play pickleball at Tommy Meredith Gym in Moultrie, GA! There are 12 wood and hard courts. 9 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.
